name: io.github.Scormave/gramps-web-mcp
title: Gramps Web MCP
description: MCP server for structured access to Gramps Web genealogy data

environmentVariables.name: GRAMPS_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Gramps Web instance

environmentVariables.name: GRAMPS_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: Gramps Web API password or token

environmentVariables.name: GRAMPS_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to block create, update, and delete tools
